mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE SET PLC_NAME = #{dto.plcName}, PLC_ADDR = #{dto.plcAddr}, PLC_DADDR = #{dto.plcDaddr}, PLC_TELNO = #{dto.plcTelno}, PLC_HOMEPAGE = #{dto.plcHomepage}, PLC_OVERVIEW = #{dto.plcOverview}, PLC_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE PLC_NO = #{plcNo}

UPDATE PLACE_PLAY SET PLAY_INFOCENTER = #{dto.playInfocenter}, PLAY_PARKING = #{dto.playParking}, PLAY_RESTDATE = #{dto.playRestdate}, PLAY_USETIME = #{dto.playUsetime}, PLAY_EVENT_START = NULLIF(#{dto.playEventStart}, ''), PLAY_EVENT_END = NULLIF(#{dto.playEventEnd}, ''), PLAY_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE PLAY_PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE p WHERE p.PLC_CAT_CD = 'PLC002'
AND p.PLC_USE_YN = 'N'
AND p.PLC_USE_YN = 'Y'
AND p.PLC_RGN_CD = #{rgnCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE SET PLC_USE_YN = #{useYn}, PLC_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
mapper.select: SELECT p.PLC_NO AS plcNo, p.PLC_ID AS plcId, p.PLC_RGN_CD AS plcRgnCd, p.PLC_NAME AS plcName, p.PLC_ADDR AS plcAddr, p.PLC_DADDR AS plcDaddr, p.PLC_LAT AS plcLat, p.PLC_LOT AS plcLot, p.PLC_TELNO AS plcTelno, p.PLC_HOMEPAGE AS plcHomepage, p.PLC_OVERVIEW AS plcOverview, p.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS plcMainImgUrl, p.PLC_THUM_IMG_URL AS plcThumImgUrl, p.PLC_FLT_CD AS plcFltCd, pl.PLAY_INFOCENTER AS playInfocenter, pl.PLAY_PARKING AS playParking, pl.PLAY_RESTDATE AS playRestdate, pl.PLAY_USETIME AS playUsetime, pl.PLAY_EVENT_START AS playEventStart, pl.PLAY_EVENT_END AS playEventEnd FROM PLACE p LEFT JOIN PLACE_PLAY pl ON p.PLC_NO = pl.PLAY_PLC_NO WHERE p.PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
